learning_outcomes.description: Design a maintainable software architecture for a stated organisational problem.
Implement and test a working software system using appropriate engineering practices.
Analyse security and privacy risks and implement proportionate controls.

artifacts.extracted_text:
ICT2204 Individual API Design Portfolio
Weighting: 30%
Learning outcomes assessed: LO1, LO2, LO3
Students design, implement, test, and security-review an API. Submit an individual repository, architecture decision records, automated test evidence, a threat model, an AI-use declaration, and complete an individual viva. Guided AI use is permitted for explanation of errors, critique, and test-case ideation. Complete solution generation is prohibited. Students must verify, cite, and disclose significant AI assistance.

Architecture decisions: 25 marks
Implementation quality: 25 marks
Testing evidence: 20 marks
Security and privacy analysis: 20 marks
Individual viva and reflective verification: 10 marks

ICT2204 Module Descriptor
Assessment weighting: 30%
Credits: 15

LO1: Design a maintainable software architecture for a stated organisational problem.
LO2: Implement and test a working software system using appropriate engineering practices.
LO3: Analyse security and privacy risks and implement proportionate controls.
